name: POWER OUTAGE : RPG
description:
You were hosting a birthday party, specifically yours. You have invited a few people: Maria (not originally invited), Lila, Jake, Aiden and Grace. They were supposed to go at your house exactly 5:50 PM.

When they got to your house, the entire neighborhood's electricity suddenly came into an outage.

You still insisted them to stay in your house even though it was very dark...

How would you handle this situation?!
creator: axstrid
